Title: Create a new price list
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pricing module > Price Lists
2. Click 'Add' button
3. Enter price list name
4. Select currency
5. Click 'Create' button
Expected Result:
1. New price list is created
2. New price list is displayed on Price Lists screen

Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Price list created [PRICE-001]
Steps:
1. Navigate to Pricing module > Price Lists
2. Open existing price list
3. Modify price list details (name, description)
4. Click 'Save' button
5. Verify changes in the table
Expected Result: All changes are saved. Data in the table is updated.

Title: Add prices to the product
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Price list created [PRICE-001]
Products added to price list [PRICE-005]
Steps:
Step 1: Add List Price
1. Go to the price list from PRICE-001
2. Click on 'Prices' widget
3. Go to any product
4. Enter price into 'List Price' input field
5. Click 'Save'

Step 2: Add Sale Price
1. Go to same product again
2. Enter Sale price to the input field
3. Click 'Save'

Step 3: Add price with different min quantity
1. Go to same product again
2. Add one more price
3. Specify min quantity different from previous steps
4. Enter List and Sales prices
5. Click 'Save'
Expected Result:
Step 1: System saves entered price and displays product Price in 'Price range' column

Step 2: System saves changes. Price range consists of List price and Sale price

Step 3:
1. System saves changes and entered prices are displayed in 'Price range' column
2. Number of prices is displayed in '#' column
3. Specified price is available for specified Min. Quantity

Title: Price with highest priority shown on Storefront

3. Go to storefront
4. Go to product from preconditions
5. Verify product price

1. Go back to Backend
2. Set priority of price list assignment #2 higher than #1
3. Go to storefront
4. Reload page
5. Go to product from preconditions
6. Verify product price
Expected Result:
Step 1: Product price = price specified in price list #1

Step 2: Product price = price specified in price list #2

Title: Add pricelist with different Min qty > Check list/sale price in Cart
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Product1 configured with tiered pricing:
- qty=1: ListPrice1=349.00 / SalePrice1=210.00
- qty=4: ListPrice2=100.00 / SalePrice2=N/A
- qty=10: ListPrice3=88.00 / SalePrice3=69.00
Note: If Sale Price is N/A it is ignored
Steps:
Step 1: Verify qty=1 pricing
1. Go to Storefront
2. Open product page for Product1
3. Verify list/sale price shows 349/210 USD per item

Step 2: Verify qty=1 in cart
1. Add 1 product to cart
2. Verify list/sale price in cart
3. Verify discount calculation

Step 3: Verify qty=4 pricing
1. Set qty = 4 in cart
2. Verify list/sale price in cart
3. Verify discount calculation

Step 4: Verify qty=10 pricing
1. Set qty = 10 in cart
2. Verify list/sale price in cart
3. Verify discount calculation
Expected Result:
Step 1: List/sale price = 349/210 USD per item

Step 2: List/sale price matches catalog. DiscountAmount = ListPrice1 - SalePrice1 (per item with min qty 1)

Step 3: List price still 349 but new price is 100. DiscountAmount = (ListPrice1 - ListPrice2) × 4

Step 4: List price still 349 but new price is 69. DiscountAmount = (ListPrice1 - SalePrice3) × 10
